titleStmt.title: SII 26.720: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 720. (A.R. No. 669 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Vīra Rāmanāthadēva: Year 13, Mēsha (Chittirai) śu. [. .], Sunday, Āyilyam = 1267 A.D., April 4 f.d.n. ·12. The week-day was Monday.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 870 kalam of paddy to provide for food and other offerings, services, and repairs and constructions in the temple of Tiruneḍuṅgaḷa-uḍaiyār in Vaḍakavi-nāḍu in Pāṇḍikulāśani-vaḷanāḍu, made by Uḍaiyāṉ Kuṟṟamaṟiñjāṉ Vaṇigai Purandar of Ariyalūr. It also records that the service of tiruchchiṉṉam should be held in front of the image of the deity whenever Vaṇigai Purandarar Tampirān attended the minor services.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . sārvvabhuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrībhojalavirarāmaṉātatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 vatu meṣaṉāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu
miyum ṉāyaṟṟuk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Āyiliyattu ṉāḷ pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷaṉāṭṭu vaṭakaviṉāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruneṭuṅkaḷa Uṭai
ya ṉāyaṉā(ā)r(ṉār) tirukkoyilu Amutu paṭikkum viñcanattukkum palapaṇi nimantakāṟkum tirupaṇikkum Ariyalūr Uṭaiyāṉ Uṭai
yāṉ kuṟṟamaṟiñcāṉ vaṇikai purantarar pakkal Etuppai vāṅkiṉa nellāya Ivāratiṭṭu kiḻitta nellu Eṇṇūṟṟu Eḻu
patiṉ kalamum kuṭuttapaṭikku Ivaṅkṣattukku Aṟputaiyamāka Uṭaiyār tirumunpe Ariyalū Uṭaiyār vaṇikai purantarar
ttampirān vanta ciṟukālaṅkaḷtoṟum tirucciṉṉam paṇimāṟa mutalikaḷ tiruviḷamākaiyil Ippaṭikku kalveṭṭi kuṭu
ttom tāṉattomum Ūromum Iṉta taṉmam vaṇikai purintaraṉ taṉmam §
Digital edition of SII 26.720 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
